title: Doggy Talents Next's Palette Of Paws
description: Every Paws is a Note in the Grand Wolf Concerto!
body:
🦴🐾 === DTN's Palette Of Paws === 🐾🦴

- 🎼🎹 Every Paws is a Note in the Grand Wolf Concerto! 🎼🎹 -

Since the New Minecraft Wolves debut in the Armored Paws Drop, the Biome-specific Wolf Variants remain an interesting motif to explore and develop upon, as each of the Variants is unique and special in its way, encouraging the player to adventure in search for their Doggy Companions. We - the Doggy Talents Next team decided to compose our interpretation of the motif by creating our own variants using our style with inspiration from the existing ones.

Each Wolf Variant will be spawned throughout your world in their assigned biome. 

Some may have special abilities. Adventure and win the hearts of them all!

------------🦴🐾A few words on integration with DTN🦴🐾-------------

DTNP can run independently on its own. (However, as for now, DTNP Fabric will require DTN to be run as DTN is containing some porting utilities that DTNP depends on to be run on fabric)

However, we fully integrated this mod with Doggy Talents Next as the Wolves can be trained into DTN's Wolves and keep their variants.

-------------🦴🐾Check out other products!🦴🐾-------------

  1. New Wolves X DoggyTalentsNext Resource Pack (client)
  2. Doggy Talents Next
  3. BetterDogs X DTN
  4. Doggy Talents Next's Community Skin Expansion

Having issues? Please post all issues and questions on Github or our  Discord Server! It would make our work a lot easier we can get together on the same page!


We also made a YouTube channel: 【 狼才能次 】🦴 DoggyTalentsNextMod OFFICIAL 🦴
